use_cases: Selecting a single option from a list of choices in forms and settings
E-commerce product filtering by a single category
Configuration and preference selection in SaaS dashboards
Multi-step form progression with single selections
ai_summary: A minimalist radio group component built with Base UI that enables single-option selection from a list. Features circular radio indicators with checked/unchecked states, accessible focus-visible outlines for keyboard navigation, and standard form behavior. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a clean gray color scheme and proper ARIA labeling for screen readers.
